<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; /** * Class PostWithMaxLength. */ class PostWithMaxLengthSplitWords extends Post { /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', 'maxLength' => 10, 'maxLengthKeepWords' => false, ], ]; } }
